arts.ttl: A 'pinch me' moment - Rogers on England call-up
arts.sum: Aston Villa forward Morgan Rogers describes it as a "pinch me" moment after being called up by England for November’s Nations League games.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley focused on players present as nine drop out of England squad – video
arts.sum: Lee Carsley played down the idea of tension between club and country after nine players pulled out of the England squad. The England interim manager said: 'We’ve got a really good relationship with all the clubs, especially the medical departments.' Anthony Gordon, who has seven international appearances, added: 'We can only focus on the players who are here.' Anthony Gordon heeds England’s call as no-shows undermine Lee Carsley Harry Kane set to be left out by Carsley for England’s crunch match with Greece Continue reading...

arts.ttl: There was always a pathway - Harwood-Bellis on first England call-up
arts.sum: Southampton defender Taylor Harwood-Bellis says "there was always a pathway" after being handed his first England senior call-up by interim manager Lee Carsley - the pair worked together with England Under-21s.

arts.ttl: England: Club vs country back with a vengeance as drop-outs damage what Gareth Southgate took years to build
arts.sum: Harry Kane criticism of players dropping out should be a concern for the FA

arts.ttl: Ben White 'to make shock return to England setup under Thomas Tuchel' following two years in the cold - after Arsenal star refused to play under Gareth Southgate amid rift with coach
arts.sum: The Arsenal defender has gone from strength to strength in the right-back position for Mikel Arteta 's impressive side but his versatility is increasingly being missed by England.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley hits back at Pep Guardiola over Jack Grealish injury row
arts.sum: Lee Carsley has dismissed Pep Guardiola's spiky reaction to Jack Grealish's England call-up.

arts.ttl: England out to avoid early World Cup setback in high-stakes Greece showdown
arts.sum: England desperately need a win in Athens to avoid an embarrassing start to the Thomas Tuchel era

arts.ttl: Liverpool defender called up after England suffer another injury
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Jarell Quansah has been called up to replace Everton's Jarrad Branthwaite in the England squad.

arts.ttl: David Beckham's private message to Cole Palmer speaks volumes about Man Utd icon
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has caught the attention of football fans worldwide over the last couple of seasons for his achievements for both club and country, with David Beckham even reaching out to him

arts.ttl: Reason Thomas Tuchel isn't managing England yet as he misses Greece and Ireland matches
arts.sum: England fans will have to wait until next year to see Thomas Tuchel take charge of the team, with Lee Carsley overseeing the Nations League games against Greece and Ireland
